description: Style Notetonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring an asymmetric neckline, this black top has one shoulder styling with a raglan sleeve and shimmery graphic print on the frontMaterial and Care94% viscose and 6% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
